they took her,and asked her, Of what people art thou? and whence comest thou? and whither goest

1 Akabia Ὁ. Mahalalel said: Keep in view three things, and thou wilt not come into the clutches of sin ;—know whence thou comest, and whither thou goest, and before whom thou art to give strict account. Azow whence thou comest,—from a fetid drop; and whither thou goest,—to the place of dust, worm, and maggot ; and before whom thou art to give strict account,—before the King of the kings of the…
